parameters.query: SELECT id as source_id, name, source_type, channel, feed_url, tags, domain_focus, cadence, trust_weight, noise_level, keywords FROM horizon.sources WHERE enabled = true AND channel = 'rss' AND feed_url != '' ;

INSERT INTO horizon.items (source_id, company_id, published_at, title, url, content_text, raw, item_hash)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.source_id }}',
  '67dedae0-7746-4750-8469-abbbf7429439',
  {{ $json.published_at ? "'" + $json.published_at + "'" : 'NOW()' }},
  '{{ ($json.title || "").replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 500) }}',
  '{{ ($json.url || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.content_text || "").replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 20000) }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.raw || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.hash || "nohash" }}'
) ON CONFLICT (source_id, item_hash) DO UPDATE SET discovered_at = NOW()
RETURNING id as item_id, source_id, '{{ ($json.source_type || "secondary").replace(/'/g, "''") }}' as source_type, '{{ ($json.title || "").replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 500) }}' as title, '{{ ($json.url || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}' as url, '{{ ($json.content_text || "").replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 5000) }}' as content_text, '{{ ($json.source_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}' as source_name;

INSERT INTO horizon.events (source_id, item_id, company_id, category, is_candidate, severity, title, summary, evidence_urls, promotion_rule)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.source_id }}'::uuid,
  {{ $json.item_id ? "'" + $json.item_id + "'::uuid" : 'NULL' }},
  '67dedae0-7746-4750-8469-abbbf7429439'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.category || "category_formation" }}',
  {{ $json.is_candidate === false ? false : true }},
  {{ $json.severity || 1 }},
  '{{ ($json.event_title || "").replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 500) }}',
  '{{ ($json.summary || "").replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 2000) }}',
  '{{ $json.evidence_urls || "[]" }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.is_candidate === false ? "primary" : "candidate" }}'
WHERE '{{ $json.source_id }}' != 'undefined'
RETURNING id as event_id;

SELECT e.id as event_id, e.severity, e.title, e.summary, e.evidence_urls
FROM horizon.events e
WHERE e.is_candidate = false
  AND e.severity >= 3
  AND e.created_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
ORDER BY e.severity DESC, e.created_at DESC
LIMIT 3;

INSERT INTO control_plane.signals (
  signal_type, severity, title, summary, evidence_urls,
  source_schema, source_table, source_id
)
VALUES (
  'horizon',
  {{ $json.severity }},
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.summary || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{}',
  'horizon',
  'events',
  '{{ $json.event_id }}'
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
